---
description: "I explain back what was just written or discussed. The model corrects me. This is retrieval practice and the highest-leverage habit for retaining understanding."
agent: "ask"
---

I am going to explain back what I think the code / algorithm / concept does. Correct me where I am wrong.

Do not confirm what I got right — only correct what I got wrong, and explain specifically why my understanding was incorrect. If my explanation reveals a gap I did not notice, point it out.

After my explanation, ask me one follow-up question that probes the part of my understanding that was shakiest or most superficial.

My explanation: ${input:explanation:Write your explanation of what the code or concept does}
